title: stevia tomentosa
intro: Stevia tomentosa, also known as the prairie sweet, is a perennial plant native to Paraguay and parts of South America, belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Stevia tomentosa offers various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, aiding in weight loss, and improving glucose tolerance. Herbal preparations of Stevia tomentosa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce stress.
